deep_dive.title: Viking Hill Dataset: A Lidar-Radar-Camera Dataset for Detection and Segmentation in Forest Scenes
deep_dive.abstract: Autonomous robots operating under forest canopies need robust perception of trees and surrounding vegetation across varying seasonal conditions. Existing forestry datasets provide lidar or camera data with per-tree annotations, but none include co-registered 4D imaging radar -- a modality of growing interest for its resilience to visual degradation, surface contamination, and vegetation occlusion. We introduce a multi-sensor forest dataset collected by a mobile robot equipped with a high-resolution FMCW imaging radar, lidar, RGB camera, IMU, and RTK-GNSS. The site was recorded in two sessions under contrasting vegetation states, and 3D cuboid annotations -- including per-tree diameter estimates -- provide shared semantic labels across all three perception modalities. Furthermore, we provide baseline results for semantic segmentation of the radar and lidar point clouds using MinkowskiUNet. Radar achieves IoU scores competitive with lidar for dominant classes (ground 91%, canopy 86%) while lagging on geometrically fine structures such as tree trunks (56% vs. 74%). A cross-modality analysis further compares lidar and radar trunk segmentation against an RGB detection model, and a diameter-stratified evaluation reveals how trunk segmentation quality varies with tree size. Beyond segmentation, the co-registered multi-modal data and RTK-GNSS-aided reference positioning support research in mapping, localization, and sensor fusion under canopy. The dataset and annotation tools are publicly available.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: multi-sensor forest dataset with lidar, radar, camera; enables fusion of multimodal remote sensing data
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 包含激光雷达、雷达和相机的多传感器森林数据集，支持异源遥感数据融合
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 包含激光雷达、雷达和相机的多传感器森林数据集，支持异源遥感数据融合

deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Presents a new multi-sensor forest dataset with co-registered lidar, radar, and camera data, enabling fusion of complementary modalities for robust perception.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有林业数据集缺乏4D成像雷达，该工作首次引入包含激光雷达、雷达和RGB相机的多传感器森林数据集，在不同季节采集并带有3D标注。数据集为多模态遥感数据融合提供了基准，尤其适用于需要鲁棒感知的机器人应用。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有林业数据集缺乏4D成像雷达，该工作首次引入包含激光雷达、雷达和RGB相机的多传感器森林数据集，在不同季节采集并带有3D标注。数据集为多模态遥感数据融合提供了基准，尤其适用于需要鲁棒感知的机器人应用。

deep_dive.title: ROSA-TFormer: A Radar-Optical Sensor-Aware Temporal Transformer for Pinus sylvestris Plantation Classification in Northern Shaanxi Using GEE-Derived Sentinel-1/2 Time Series
deep_dive.abstract: Accurate identification of Pinus sylvestris var. mongolica plantations is important for monitoring afforestation quality and ecological restoration in northern Shaanxi. This paper proposes ROSA-TFormer, a radar-optical sensor-aware temporal Transformer for P. sylvestris classification using Sentinel-1/2 time-series data generated on Google Earth Engine. The model integrates separate SAR and optical embedding branches, a sensor-aware gate, and temporal attention pooling to capture multi-source seasonal features. Experiments on monthly and half-month point-level datasets show that ROSA-TFormer achieves strong classification performance, with 99.67% overall accuracy, 99.56% macro F1, and 98.91% P. sylvestris F1 on the HalfMonth-dataBig dataset. Spatial block validation and ablation results further indicate the effectiveness of radar-optical temporal fusion and sensor-aware modeling. The results demonstrate the potential of ROSA-TFormer for point-level P. sylvestris plantation classification, while broader wall-to-wall validation remains necessary.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: radar-optical sensor-aware fusion for plantation classification
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 雷达-光学传感器感知融合用于植被分类
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 雷达-光学传感器感知融合用于植被分类
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 雷达-光学传感器感知融合用于植被分类
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes ROSA-TFormer, a radar-optical sensor-aware temporal Transformer that fuses Sentinel-1 SAR and Sentinel-2 optical time-series for Pinus sylvestris plantation classification.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对精确识别樟子松人工林的需求，提出ROSA-TFormer模型，通过分离的SAR和光学嵌入分支、传感器感知门控和时间注意力池化，融合Sentinel-1/2时间序列数据。在月下旬点级数据集上实现了99.67%的分类精度，验证了多模态遥感图像融合的有效性，但未涉及缺失模态场景。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对精确识别樟子松人工林的需求，提出ROSA-TFormer模型，通过分离的SAR和光学嵌入分支、传感器感知门控和时间注意力池化，融合Sentinel-1/2时间序列数据。在月下旬点级数据集上实现了99.67%的分类精度，验证了多模态遥感图像融合的有效性，但未涉及缺失模态场景。

quick_skim.title: Multi-Modal Contrastive Learning for Implicit Earth Embeddings via Location Tying
quick_skim.abstract: Spatial prediction tasks are often limited by a lack of high-quality labelled ground-truth observations. To overcome this challenge, self-supervised pre-training is a possible solution, with contrastive learning dominant for location encoders. Those approaches usually align geographic coordinates with just one additional modality. We propose two multimodal contrastive learning architectures: Multimodal Embedding via Location Tying (MELT) and Sequential Alternating Location Training (SALT). These architectures expand this framework beyond two modalities by utilising unpaired geospatial data. Both methods are technically viable and match the performance of the strongest two-modality baseline (SATCLIP) across four downstream tasks. However, increasing the number of modalities does not consistently improve performance, suggesting that the chosen location encoder is the main limitation - the contrastive objective reaches its peak early, regardless of modality diversity or pre-training volume. MELT provides more stable training than SALT and presents a stronger foundation for future scaling.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Multimodal contrastive learning for geospatial embeddings, enabling fusion of multiple modalities
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 多模态对比学习架构，可实现地理空间数据多模态融合
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 多模态对比学习架构，可实现地理空间数据多模态融合
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 多模态对比学习架构，可实现地理空间数据多模态融合
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes MELT and SALT multimodal contrastive learning architectures that align multiple unpaired geospatial modalities via location tying, matching two-modality baselines.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对空间预测任务中标注样本稀缺的问题，本文提出两种多模态对比学习架构MELT和SALT，通过位置绑定的方式将地理坐标与多种未配对模态隐式对齐。该方法突破了传统仅支持两个模态的限制，能够融合更多种类的遥感数据。在四个下游任务上，性能与最强双模态基线SATCLIP持平，展示了多模态融合的潜力。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对空间预测任务中标注样本稀缺的问题，本文提出两种多模态对比学习架构MELT和SALT，通过位置绑定的方式将地理坐标与多种未配对模态隐式对齐。该方法突破了传统仅支持两个模态的限制，能够融合更多种类的遥感数据。在四个下游任务上，性能与最强双模态基线SATCLIP持平，展示了多模态融合的潜力。
